text: Some people want you to believe oil is dead, but is it? Global energy demand is growing rapidly. Energy fuels everything we do. As the global economy recovers and population grows, our need for sustainable energy will as well. Other countries are acting swiftly to seize this opportunity. So, what will we do about it? Instead of denying reality, let's act together to solve this challenge. Canada has the energy the world needs, with some of the largest known reserves and leading innovation in clean technology. We can meet the world's energy needs with our sustainable resources, capturing the opportunity to build stronger communities and a stronger Canada. Vote Energy. Learn more at voteenergy.ca.
